app.title: ProductCanvas AI
app.subtitle: AI image studio from templates
template.importHint: Import a template first: drag PNG/JPG/WebP here or use the button
template.reorderHint: Drag and drop templates to reorder
template.empty: No template yet. Please import one.
template.importInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP can be imported as templates.
template.changeRequest.placeholder: e.g. change neon frame from blue to red, enlarge logo…
template.lockedHint: Template is locked – accept or reject the AI preview first.
template.invalidSize: Please enter valid width and height (64–8192 px).
template.changeOptionalHint: Optional when another output format is selected – then only change format and generate.
template.needChangeOrSize: Enter a change request or choose a different output format.
template.previewEmpty: Generate an AI preview to compare.
refs.title: Reference product images
refs.dropHint: Drag images here or use the button
refs.reorderHint: Drag to reorder – first image = main reference
refs.usageHint: Reference images are used for prompt building and image generation (faithful product reproduction).
refs.dropInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP are supported.
effect.importHint: Import or AI-generate effect images: drag PNG/JPG/WebP here
effect.importInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP can be imported as effect images.
effect.selectionHint: Select here (None = off). Effect is used as product background; override via extra prompt.
effect.noneHint: No effect image – product background stays unchanged.
settings.title: Settings
settings.imageOptionsHint: Size and quality passed to Bridge/Codex (as in AI Gateway / PMS).
settings.internalCommentHint: Notes or clipboard only – not sent to the AI.
settings.codexBackendHint: Direct CLI calls codex exec on this PC. Bridge mode requires pairing with the tray app.
settings.codexCliPathHint: Leave empty for automatic detection. Overrides apply only in Direct CLI mode.
settings.codexCliPath.missing: Configured path not found — auto-detection is used until you fix or clear it.
settings.codexCliPath.envOverride: ALORBACH_CODEX_BINARY is set in the environment and overrides this setting.
preview.empty: Generate an image to see the preview.
preview.fullscreenClose: Scroll wheel to zoom, click or Esc to close
preview.changeRequest.placeholder: e.g. change neon frame from blue to red, make product larger…
preview.compareHint: Original and edited preview side by side – scroll wheel to zoom, Esc to close
preview.lockedHint: Preview is locked – accept or reject the AI edit first.
preview.pendingGenerateConfirm: An AI edit is pending. Discard it and generate a new image?
preview.pendingReplaceConfirm: An AI edit is pending. Discard it and replace the preview?
preview.dropHint: Drag an image here to replace the preview
preview.dropInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP are supported.
template.compareHint: Original and AI preview side by side – scroll wheel to zoom, Esc to close
template.editorRefHint: Optional – e.g. use background, texture, or mood from this image in your change request.
template.editorRefEmpty: No reference image yet. Drag here or use the button.
template.editorRefDropInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP are supported.
wait.title: Please wait
bridge.setup.title: Set up Codex Local Bridge
bridge.setup.pairingCode: Pairing code (6 digits from tray app)
bridge.status.needsInstall: Codex CLI not installed — click Connect to install
bridge.status.needsPairing: Pairing required – enter 6-digit code from Bridge tray
bridge.status.title: Bridge status
bridge.dialog.title: Codex Local Bridge
bridge.dialog.hint: Enter the 6-digit pairing code from the Bridge tray menu and click Connect.
bridge.dialog.hintDirect: Codex CLI must be installed and signed in on this PC. Use Sign in to Codex if needed.
bridge.dialog.hintInstallCodex: Codex CLI is not installed yet. Click Connect to install it with your confirmation, then sign in with ChatGPT.
bridge.dialog.hintNotRunning: The bridge is not reachable. Click Connect to download or start it automatically.
bridge.dialog.hintLogin: Codex CLI must be signed in before pairing. Use Sign in to Codex if needed.
bridge.dialog.resetDone: Pairing token cleared. Enter a new code from the Bridge tray.
error.needsPairing: This app is not paired with Codex Local Bridge yet. Enter the pairing code from the Bridge tray and click Connect.
error.needsCodexLogin: Codex CLI is not signed in. Click Sign in to Codex or run codex login in a terminal.
error.bodyTooLarge: Reference images are too large for the Bridge. Please use smaller source files – the app no longer resizes references automatically. See debug log for details.
error.referenceAttachFailed: Could not attach reference images to the Bridge. Check the debug log and try again.
error.bridgeTimeout: Image generation is taking longer than usual or the Bridge is not responding. Check Bridge tray status and try again.
debug.title: Debug log
debug.refsNotForwarded: Warning: references in HTTP payload but not sent to Codex (--image). Bridge ≥ 1.0.4 required.
prompt.pendingPreflight: Created when you click Generate image (preflight with references).
codex.install.declined: Codex CLI installation was cancelled. AI features stay unavailable until Codex is installed.
codex.install.failed: Codex CLI could not be installed automatically. See the OpenAI Codex CLI docs for manual setup.
codex.install.message: ProductCanvas AI will download and install the official Codex CLI on this PC (OpenAI installer, then winget, then npm if needed). Continue?
codex.install.success: Codex CLI installed ({version}). Sign in with your ChatGPT account next.
codex.install.title: Install Codex CLI
codex.subscription.hint: Requires an active ChatGPT subscription (Plus, Pro, Business, Edu, or Enterprise). Codex usage is billed through your ChatGPT plan — not a separate ProductCanvas fee.
